ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). All sanctions previously issued are rescinded. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

Notice Of Motion For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-08-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lisa K. Rauch, Esq., Howard Rome Martin & Ridley LLP, Telepone (650) 365-7715, appearing for for Defendant Golden Gate Bridge, Highway, and Transportation, et al;
No other appearances;

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE, HIGHWAY, AND TRANSPORTATION, and SHANE WEINSTEIN's Motion For Terminating Sanctions. GRANTED. Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Jason Yurasek; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

The Order To Show Cause is re-set to FEB-26-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. ***NOTE: This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) if there is no appearance on the next hearing date and compliance.*** Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to OCT-02-2018 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-18-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE, HIGHWAY, AND TRANSPORTATION, SHANE WEINSTEIN'S Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And For Monetary Sanctions is unopposed and GRANTED. Plaintiff is directed to (a) provide verified responses, without objections, to GGBHTD's Form Interrogatories, Set One, Special Interrogatories Set One, and Request for Production of Documents, Set One, and to Weinstein's Special Interrogatories Set One, and Request for Production of Documents, Set One, and (b) pay discovery sanctions to Defendant's counsel in the amount of $570, within 30 days of service of notice of entry of this order.

Order is signed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Roger Mead; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
